description: Faction-count reconciliation (narrative-engine census fork 10; first FA-lane allocation). The corpus carries an unreconciled faction count of 4-8 across four docs (dossier_combinatorial_census.md §1.2). Blocks any faction-scope bank/binding table in the narrative engine (v2 §6 content pipeline) and clean faction-scope aggregation templates. ACTION: enumerate the four conflicting sources, propose the canonical roster, obtain Jordan's count ruling (no default exists — deliberately NOT resolved by the 2026-07-05 ratify-all, ED-IN-0011), then propagate via the naming/roster surfaces (ties ED-IN-0008). Tracked in workplan v6 §5 T1.

Author the strategic-turn surface / domain_actions home doc (edge-playability EP-2). The da.* five-type family is an after-the-fact outcome-classification schema for PP-686 mission-alignment scoring, not a player verb menu; the actual playable verbs are fragmented across params/bg/core.md (card-hand + Ob table), params/bg/faction_actions.md (per-faction actions), and the faction_layer resolver math, while module_contracts carries domain_actions doc:null with only a PROPOSED audit-output resolver spec. ACTION: author one home doc unifying card-hand + faction actions + resolver + da.* tagging (what a player does on their strategic turn, costs, degrees, feedback per verb); flip the doc:null. Composes with ED-1051 (contract gaps) and the workplan v6 FA lane. RATIFIED-AS-ACCEPTED by Jordan 2026-07-05 ('Ratify all' on PR #81; audit: designs/audit/2026-07-05-edge-playability-audit/edge_playability_audit_v1.md §7 item 5.

BG victory-params re-export (edge-playability EP-10; an S-1/ED-IN-0007 register-back-propagation instance). params/bg/victory.md still lists Varfell Path C 'Thread Supremacy' (VTM=5) — STRUCK by PP-663 in victory_v30.md L388 — plus pre-PP-663 VTM>=3/>=4 and >=4-territory co-victory thresholds where canon now requires WR>=2 and >=3 territories, and omits the Varfell-controls-T13 gate; params/board_game.md's index is 100 percent dead (16 references/params_bg_*.md links, zero exist); params/bg/phases.md both dissolves and announces Hollow Victory and cites the nonexistent designs/board_game/victory_v30.md. ACTION: re-derive params/bg/victory.md from victory_v30.md, fix the board_game.md index paths, reconcile the phases.md contradiction. A strategic layer built from these tables today would coach the player toward a dead victory path. RATIFIED-AS-ACCEPTED by Jordan 2026-07-05 ('Ratify all' on PR #81; audit: designs/audit/2026-07-05-edge-playability-audit/edge_playability_audit_v1.md §7 item 8.

OPT-1, filed per Jordan's 2026-07-07 "ratify all" ruling (ED-IN-0026). Faction-oracle reconciliation program: implement the LPS-1 model (per-settlement L/PS, Mandate 7T/(T+6), Treasury x10 per gap-closure G2's ruling-note, da.* Key plumbing) in sim/, including the Treasury line-47 fix and the 'PS' acronym rename (C-FA-3). SEQUENCING RULED: banner the oracle NOW as pre-LPS-1/port-blocking (cheap, immediate); schedule the full LPS-1 implementation as Stratum B work per resolution_plan_v1.md — do not implement ad hoc. STRATUM-A SLICE EXECUTED 2026-07-07 (this PR): the ruled 'banner NOW' portion is done — [PRE-LPS-1 / PORT-BLOCKING] banners added to sim/autoload/game_state.py, sim/provincial/faction_action.py, sim/provincial/crown_initiative.py, sim/peninsular/accounting.py, sim/personal/parliamentary_vote.py, sim/territory/registry.py, and implementation-note headers on faction_behavior_v30.md / faction_canon_v30.md. The full LPS-1 sim implementation remains Stratum-B — stays open.

OPT-2, filed per Jordan's 2026-07-07 "ratify all" ruling (ED-IN-0026). Elimination-lockout ruling (C-EMERGE-1/2): is permanent 0-territory elimination intended (no comeback mechanic, Mil=3.0 start at the conquest floor)? DESIGN CALL RULED: NO — permanent lockout is not intended. Author a minimal comeback/mercy path; the M2 'any-seed' story bar directly conflicts with a faction being permanently and un-recoverably locked out early, and the audit's own R1-corrected read (n=100: 56/36/7/1, not a strict 0%) shows the mechanism is already near-absolute without being formally intended as such.

RATIFIED subtractive verdicts for the FA action set (ED-IN-0027; decision ratified, EXECUTION this FA-lane follow-up; coordinate with ED-FA-0002 domain_actions home doc + C-FA-12). Parliamentary-Motion punitive cluster DISTILL (5 rows of faction_layer_v30 §5.4 + §5.5 ladder share -> 1 parameterized action, keeping Outlawry CB-to-all + Blockade Military-gate as explicit parameters); da.* Key taxonomy REFINE (it is the substrate's Key-routing layer, NOT a duplicate menu — author the verb->bucket crosswalk, shrinking the domain_actions doc:null closure to a crosswalk-table task); Investigate/Spy REFINE (add Spy's missing Failure branch, matching sibling Survey); Diplomacy DISTILL (duplicate of Treaty §3.3 Ph2 — drop the params/bg/core.md Standard-Action Ob row); Claim Masterless DISTILL (§1.5 dedicated rule -> conditional clause on Conquest target-selection); Thread-Operation-as-FA-action REFINE (critic-downgraded from PRUNE — a legitimate FA/TW interface; single-source the mechanics to TW attempt_*, keep the FA slot-cost/PP-182 interface note). Docket rows: ed_options.md FA section. · EXECUTED 2026-07-08 (FA-lane follow-up to ED-IN-0027, resolves this ED). params/bg/core.md Standard Action Ob Reference: Diplomacy-between-players DISTILLED (retired row -> Treaty §3.3 Ph2), Thread Operation single-sourced to the TW lane (kept Pontifex/Weaver slot-eligibility + PP-182), Spy given its previously-blank Failure branch. faction_layer_v30: §5.4 five punitive motions (Censure/Embargo/Blockade/Combined/Outlawry) reframed as severity TIERS of one parameterized 'Parliamentary Sanction' action (tier names retained so Sacred-Veto/CB/Guilds-AI-vote/§5.6-erosion hooks still resolve; constructive motions stay distinct); §1.5 Claim Masterless annotated as a March/Conquest target-type variant. module_contracts domain_actions: da.* reframed as an outcome-tag crosswalk on the existing catalogs (NOT a standalone doc:null module), resolving C-FA-12; per-verb bucket assignment recorded as the residual authoring task with a directional first pass + ambiguous boundaries flagged for Jordan (audit intent gate UNDETERMINED, not fabricated). No sim edits (faction_action.py is the NPC selector, not a player menu; PRE-LPS-1 work stays ED-FA-0004). Gates green. Decision packet prepared 2026-07-08 for the da.* bucket-boundary residual: designs/audit/2026-07-08-pessimist-action-audit/decision_packets/DP-1_FA_da_bucket_boundaries.md lays out the three undetermined forks (economic_intervention vs public_governance; antinomian_action vs public_governance; covert_betrayal scope) for Jordan to rule -- no new ED allocated yet; pick one first.

FA-1 (historical-precedent docket): Fiscal Stance (extraction rate) -- fills the admitted fiscal void between settlement Prosperity and faction Wealth (faction_action.py has no tax decision at all). Per-faction/province stance in {Light, Standard, Extraction}; yield = Prosperity x k x rate_mult x compliance(settlement L), compliance rising with Legitimacy (Levi 1988 quasi-voluntary compliance); Light stance grants a dearth-season PS bump (Scott 1976 extraction-invariance). Promote-ready as SHAPE; rate constants sim-calibrated before ledgering, per CLAUDE.md SS5/SS7. Target: new section in faction_layer_v30 or the ED-FA-0002 domain_actions home doc; consumed by sim/territory/registry.py + Accounting Treasury. AUTHORED (2026-07-08): drafted into faction_layer_v30.md new §5.9 Fiscal Stance as PROPOSED (yield = Prosperity x k x rate_mult x compliance(L), compliance(L) = 0.5 + L/14). Sim implementation (Treasury coupling in sim/territory/registry.py, the per-faction/province stance choice itself) is NOT done here -- this entry stays open pending that follow-on lane.

FA-2: re-ground Muster as a fiscal-military purchase, not a free-except-on-failure roll. sim/provincial/faction_action.py::_try_muster currently charges W only on Failure -- historically inverted (the enterpriser is paid regardless). Muster costs W-1 up front; pool = Mil + floor(W/2). Composes with the already-anchored Habsburg re-muster rule (FSS-LOOP-2). Grounding: Redlich 1964 (military-enterpriser model); Tilly 1990. EXECUTED (2026-07-08): sim/provincial/faction_action.py::_try_muster now charges W-1 up front unconditionally (pool = Mil + floor(W/2)), retiring the old Failure-only W-3 penalty. Verified against the full sim/tests suite (412 passed) and the mc_v18/F7 goldens repinned to the new campaign RNG consumption in the same commit.

FA-3 FORK (needs Jordan -- differentiates faction identity, a design-taste surface previously reserved, cf. ED-776): coercion-intensive vs capital-intensive muster asymmetry. Hafenmark musters via capital (W-2 substitutes for the Mil prerequisite, no PS cost); Varfell musters via conscription (no W cost, but PS -1 in the levied province -- the levy IS the tax). Grounding: Tilly 1990's capital-intensive (Venice/Holland) vs coercion-intensive (Brandenburg/Muscovy) trajectories; Varfell's own Mission text (tribute and conscription).

FA-4: Farm the Revenues -- a bounded, reversible collection-mode toggle. Verb: immediate W+2 (the farmer's advance), then -25% Treasury yield + PS-1/season in the farmed province for a 4-season term; spawns one Intelligence-Broker-grade NPC ('the Farmer') as a leverage/exposure surface. Early termination = buy out (W-2) or eat a Grudge tag. Grounding: Roman publicani; Ottoman iltizam/malikane (1695 term-length precedent); French Ferme Generale (odium accrues to the state -- 1794 as the deferred-cost worked example). Sits on existing broker machinery (registry.py SS4.8). Term/magnitudes sim-calibrated.

FA-5: state-conditioned faction action-mix, retiring the uncited M7_ASSUMPTION_SIX 30/35/20/15 fixed vector in faction_action.py::faction_take_action. Keep the vector as PRIOR, re-weight by state before drawing (Conquest up with CB+Mil-advantage; Govern up with undergoverned-territory share; Muster up with threat) then renormalize -- degenerates to the current mix in a neutral state. Grounding: Levy 1983 (high war baseline is period-correct, so the fix is conditioning, not pacification); Blainey 1973; Olson 1993. NOTE: stage with ED-FA-0004 (module is PRE-LPS-1/PORT-BLOCKING) -- ride the Stratum-B rewrite, don't precede it. EXECUTED (2026-07-08): faction_action.py::faction_take_action re-weights the 30/35/20/15 PRIOR vector before the single rng.random() draw via _conquest_targets/_mil_advantage_signal/_undergoverned_share/_threat_signal (all [SEED]-flagged, RNG-free), then renormalizes; verified it degenerates exactly to the original 30/65/85 cumulative mix in a neutral state. Built on the CURRENT (pre-LPS-1) scalar Faction.L schema rather than waiting on the ED-FA-0004 Stratum-B rewrite as this entry's own note suggested -- a disclosed sequencing deviation, not a hidden one; the signal functions will need revisiting once LPS-1 relocates Mandate per-settlement.

FA-6 (mixed -- (a)/(b) promote-ready, (c) FORK needing Jordan): Storm vs Terms at conquest, differentiating _try_conquest's flat Accord -25. (a) Accept surrender on terms (Success, not Overwhelming): Accord -10, settlement L seeds 2, defender marches out; (b) Storm: current Accord -25 effects, Prosperity -1; (c) NEEDS JORDAN -- Sack (post-storm only): W+2 to attacker, settlement PS/Order -> 0, every other peninsula settlement PS -1 toward the attacker for 2 seasons (the Magdeburg effect) -- an atrocity-content + W-for-legitimacy exchange-rate tone call. Grounding: Grotius III; Parker 1994 (breach/chamade convention); Sack of Magdeburg 1631 / Rome 1527. PARTIAL EXECUTION (2026-07-08, (a)/(b) only): _try_conquest now forks on battle['degree'] -- 'Success' (not routed) takes Terms (Accord -10, sets a dynamic Territory.entry_terms_l_seed = 3 matching settlement_layer_v30 §5.3's Confirm-Privileges seed value exactly, not the flatter '2' this entry's own text proposed -- reconciled to the SE-lane's more granular fork); 'Overwhelming' takes Storm (Accord -25, unchanged prior effect). AI-accepts-Terms-when-available is the [SEED] default. Consequence disclosed: resolve_mass_battle essentially never yields attacker-Overwhelming across tested seeds (765 Terms conquests, 0 Storm in the verification run), so Terms effectively replaces the old flat -25 for nearly all conquests -- a game-wide Accord-softening side effect of this fork, not a hidden one. Part (c) Sack is NOT implemented -- stays needs_jordan, unchanged.

FA-7 FORK (needs Jordan -- new subsystem state, interacts with Royal Assassination fuse arcs D/E/F): Regency interregnum on leader death with no adult designated heir. Faction enters Regency until succession resolves (unique action locked, Mandate read -1, council members become temporary multi-roots at elevated alpha per PP-686's existing multi-root machinery, rival factions gain an automatic CB window). Grounding: Henry VI minority council 1422-37; Estates-General of Tours 1484; Kantorowicz 1957 (why NORMAL succession, per SE-6, does NOT trigger this).

FA-8 FORK (needs Jordan -- softens the hegemony path GD-1 counts Tributary toward): add Protected Tributary as a second treaty-table row alongside the existing (renamed Extortive) Tributary. Protected: W-1/year but +1/year gross trade access (net 0) + casus foederis, Stability cost 0 (vs the existing -1/year). Grounding: Ragusa's Ottoman haraç relationship (tribute purchasing prosperity+protection, 15th-19th c.) vs the Danegeld extortion-spiral pole.

FA-9 FORK (needs Jordan -- adds an action to the Guilds NPC-faction roster, same class of call as other blocked roster items): Guild collective embargo ('Withdrawal of Trade') grounding the existing but mechanism-free 'Economic Leverage >= Guild Favour 5' line. Target faction's Port/City/Mine settlements yield -50% Treasury + frozen Prosperity growth while active; costs Guilds only exposure; ends on privilege restoration or buyout. Distinct from the Parliamentary Embargo (no vote, no Mandate minimum -- private action, its historical character). Grounding: Hanseatic blockades of Bruges 1358 & 1451-57; London Steelyard fights.

Citation-patch batch (CP-1, CP-3, CP-4, CP-5) -- near-zero-risk grounding annotations, core annotation work promote-ready in all four; two carry an OPTIONAL mechanic extension flagged needs_jordan within scope, not blocking the annotation itself. CP-1: annotate contest/faction.py SS7.2.1 split ratios (0.60/0.55/0.50) with Treaty of Verdun 843 partition precedent. CP-3: annotate parliamentary_vote.py abstention-resistance / band_of committee margin with Venetian non-sinceri (formal uncommitted ballot) precedent. CP-4: annotate faction_layer SS3.5 CB + War Authorisation with Roman fetial rerum repetitio / medieval diffidatio; OPTIONAL 'Demand Redress' CB-conversion step is needs_jordan. CP-5: annotate Crown Initiative modes (Royal Progress/Coronation Renewal/Great Work) with itinerant kingship / Festkronungen / civic-works-legitimacy precedent. No numeric ledger values -- citations ground mechanism, never magnitude (CLAUDE.md SS5/SS7). EXECUTED (2026-07-08): all four citation annotations landed -- CP-1 (contest/faction.py succession split-ratio / Treaty of Verdun 843), CP-3 (parliamentary_vote.py abstention-resistance / Venetian non-sinceri), CP-4 (faction_layer_v30 §3.5 Casus Belli / Roman rerum repetitio + medieval diffidatio -- the OPTIONAL 'Demand Redress' CB-conversion mechanic stays a separate, unbuilt needs_jordan fork, not blocking this entry), CP-5 (crown_initiative.py's three mode functions / itinerant kingship, Festkrönungen, civic-works legitimacy). No numeric values changed anywhere -- citations ground mechanism only, per CLAUDE.md §5/§7.

Bundle of three attribute/value coherence audit (ED-IN-0029) items, decision-ratified, execution deferred to the FA lane: (1) OPT-AV-10 Mandate dual-form marking -- no fork existed (ED-784 already blessed the dual linear-personal-view / saturating-canonical-aggregate view); mark params/factions_personal.md:14 explicitly as personal_mandate_view (ED-784) citing the saturating canonical form, sweep params/bg/* carriers. (2) OPT-AV-11 CI starting-value provenance -- four non-agreeing assertions, no supported TTRPG value exists (census C4-F3/F4); adopt the Mass-Combat-style TTRPG-vs-BG split discipline: either author a cited TTRPG start or declare Conviction Track/Influence BG/Hybrid-only, and fix params/campaign_modes.md's unsupported =15 assertion. (3) factions_personal.md Intel backfill hygiene item (co-signed with the OPT-AV-7 hygiene batch, not executed by the IN-only pass since it is a lane-owned file touch). Decision-ratified, execution pending.
